description: Bright and Bold Mum-Themed Designs: This pack of six socks features vibrant colours and cheerful designs celebrating mums, including different leg and sole patterns such as “Queen of the House” and “Supermum.” Each pair brings a playful and unique touch to your sock drawer. Comes with a charming teddy bear gift tag, allowing you to write “To” and “From,” with a sweet poem on the back to make it even more special.
